member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.StopAllBehaviorsHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the StopAllBehaviorsHelper for sending a StopAllBehaviors
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the StopAllBehaviors
to.
member.remarks: Send this message to immediately stop all behaviors from executing.
